## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Mar 13, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Dean Galli_, Jul 17, 2026, 2/5: "is not possible to save workout (add) freezing app"
            2. _Renato Neves_, Mar 13, 2026, 2/5: "Good app, I've been using it for 2 years, but in the last few weeks it "erased" my data and now I can't log in or create a new account. I hope it's just a bug and they fix it soon, I really like this app and I really didn't want to stop using it"
            3. _Federico Corradini_, Jul 15, 2026, 5/5: "Good app. After some testing I can confirm that they fixed the bug that was canceling the current workout, so it's great again."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      2 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 3, 2026 - Jul 10, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _narendar 5444_, Jul 9, 2026, 1/5: "high price"
            2. _Anj_, Jul 10, 2026, 3/5: "UI is nice, the view of muscles needing rest is really helpful. But there are some annoying things. Like for example popups about subscription or to enable notifications. I wasn't able to find how to disable this notification and I had to give in and enable it (but then it is possible to disable it in android settings). Also exercises seem to duplicate a lot and it seems like a chinese marketplace l, rather than a curated list of exercises. Also body weight exercises do not count as volume :("
            3. _Emmanuel González Ontiveros_, Jul 3, 2026, 4/5: "it is more honest app than others, at least has not a paywall, and offers free services"
